contrastSamples.pair: White active tab text on accent
Primary action accent text on warm background
Timeline muted text on dark card

contrastRisks.risk: White on #5B6CFF is estimated at 4.17:1, close to the normal-text threshold.
contrastRisks.recommendedAction: Review in Patch 5 before changing accent or tab typography.

contrastRisks.risk: Accent text on warm background is estimated at 3.76:1, acceptable only if treated as bold control text.
contrastRisks.recommendedAction: Patch 5 should test rendered button text size and consider stronger text or filled state.

contrastRisks.risk: Warning text on warm warning surface is estimated at 2.87:1.
contrastRisks.recommendedAction: Patch 5 should darken warning text or increase container emphasis.

focusRisks.risk: outline is removed but replaced by --nos-focus-ring; alpha 0.22 may be subtle on warm surfaces.
focusRisks.recommendedAction: Patch 5 should run manual keyboard review and consider stronger ring opacity.

semanticFindings: Primary actions no longer use green authority styling.
Danger actions use the Research OS danger token and are less alarmist than prior pure red styling.
Recording state no longer reads as active blue runtime state.
Disabled state still communicates unavailable controls through opacity and cursor.
Blocked timeline card still exposes danger-token emphasis.

deadStyleCandidates.reason: Legacy root tokens remain after M615-M618 and should be usage-mapped before removal.
Research OS tokens are declared but not yet applied across sidepanel surfaces.
Dark legacy island remains and should be reviewed before Patch 5 cleanup.
Several governance surfaces still use hardcoded legacy colors.
